content: Consider a directed graph $G=(V, E)$, where $V=\{0,1,2, \ldots, 100\}$ and $E=\{(i$, $j): 0 < j-i \leq 2$, for all $i, j \in V\}$. Suppose the adjacency list of each vertex is in decreasing order of vertex number, and depth-first search (DFS) is performed at vertex 0 . The number of vertices that will be discovered after vertex 50 is___________
explanation:
$$ \begin{aligned} &\text { Adjacency list : }\\ &\begin{aligned} & 0 \rightarrow 2,1 \\ & 1 \rightarrow 3,2 \\ & 2 \rightarrow 4,3 \\ & \,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\vdots \\ & 99 \rightarrow 100 \\ & 100 \rightarrow \\ & \hline \end{aligned} \end{aligned} $$

$$\eqalign{ \,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,& Dfs\,\,(0) \cr & \,\,\,\,\,\,\, \downarrow \cr & \,\,\,\,\,\,\,2 \cr & \,\,\,\,\,\,\, \downarrow \cr & \,\,\,\,\,\,\,4\, \cr & \,\,\,\,\,\,\, \downarrow \cr & \,\,\,\,\,\,\,6 \cr & \,\,\,\,\,\,\,\, \vdots \cr & \,\,\,\,\,\,\,\, \vdots \cr & \,\,\,\,(50) \cr & \,\,\,\,\,\,\, \downarrow \cr & \,\,\,\,\,\,52 \cr & \,\,\,\,\,\,\,\, \vdots \cr & \,\,\,\,\,\,\,\, \vdots \cr & 99 \leftarrow 100 \cr} $$

$$ \text { Vertex discovered after } 50 \rightarrow 101-26=75 $$
